empty.title: Tabular Reviews
empty.description: Extract data from documents into tables using AI.

ownerOnly.deleteSelectedReviews: delete {blocked} of the selected reviews — only the review creator can delete a review

column.name: Column name
column.tagHint: Press Enter or comma to add a tag.
column.promptPlaceholder: Write the analysis prompt — describe what Mike should extract from each document for this column…

sidePanel.title: Details
sidePanel.noSelection: Select a cell to view details

chat.errorOccurred: An error occurred. Please try again.

newReview.noReadyDocuments: No ready documents in this project

parties.name: Parties
parties.prompt:
List all parties to this agreement. For each party, state their full legal name, entity type, and defined role, e.g.:
• ABC Corp, a Delaware corporation ("Company")
• John Smith ("Shareholder")
One party per bullet. No additional commentary.

governingLaw.name: Governing Law
governingLaw.prompt: State only the governing law of this agreement using the short-form jurisdiction name, e.g. "New York Law", "English Law", "Indian Law", "PRC Law". No other text.

effectiveDate.name: Effective Date
effectiveDate.prompt: State only the effective date of this agreement in DD Mon YYYY format, e.g. "2 Jan 2026". If not explicitly stated, write "Not specified".

term.name: Term
term.prompt: State only the duration or term of this agreement in a concise form, e.g. "3 years", "24 months", "perpetual". No other text.

termination.name: Termination
termination.prompt: Extract the termination provisions. State who may terminate, the trigger events, required notice period, any cure period, and the key consequences of termination. Be concise.

changeOfControl.name: Change of Control
changeOfControl.prompt: Identify any change of control provisions. Summarize the trigger events, consequences, consent requirements, and any related termination or acceleration rights. Be concise.

confidentiality.name: Confidentiality
confidentiality.prompt: Summarize the confidentiality obligations: scope of confidential information, permitted disclosures, use restrictions, duration, and key carve-outs or exceptions.

assignment.name: Assignment
assignment.prompt: Is assignment of this agreement permitted without the other party's consent?

paymentAndFees.name: Payment & Fees
paymentAndFees.prompt: State the key payment obligations concisely: amount, timing, and currency, e.g. "USD 10,000 payable within 30 days of invoice". Note any late payment consequences.

amendment.name: Amendment
amendment.prompt: Summarize the amendment provisions: how amendments may be made, who must consent, and any formality requirements such as writing or signature.

indemnity.name: Indemnity
indemnity.prompt: Summarize the indemnity provisions: who indemnifies whom, the scope of indemnified losses, any liability caps or exclusions, and key claims procedures.

warranties.name: Warranties
warranties.prompt: Identify and describe key representations and warranties provided by any party, including the scope of such assurances and any specific time periods or conditions applicable to them. In particular highlight any non-standard warranties.

forceMajeure.name: Force Majeure
forceMajeure.prompt: Does this agreement contain a force majeure clause?

parties.prompt: Identify all parties referenced in the document. List their full names and describe each party's role or capacity in the agreement. If a party is not clearly identified, state "Not addressed".

changeOfControl.prompt: Identify any change of control provisions in the document. Summarize the trigger, the consequences, any consent requirements, and any related termination, acceleration, or notice obligations. If not addressed, state "Not addressed".

termination.prompt: Extract the termination provisions in the document. Summarize who may terminate, the termination triggers, any notice requirements, cure periods, and the consequences of termination. If not addressed, state "Not addressed".

governingLaw.prompt: Identify the governing law and jurisdiction provisions in the document. State the governing law, the forum for disputes, and any submission to jurisdiction or venue requirements. If not addressed, state "Not addressed".

confidentiality.prompt: Extract the confidentiality provisions in the document. Summarize the scope of confidential information, permitted disclosures, use restrictions, duration, and any carve-outs or exceptions. If not addressed, state "Not addressed".

assignment.prompt: Identify any assignment provisions in the document. Summarize whether assignment is permitted, restricted, or requires consent, and note any exceptions or deemed assignments. If not addressed, state "Not addressed".

paymentAndFees.prompt: Extract the payment and fee terms in the document. Summarize payment obligations, amounts, timing, currencies, fee types, and any consequences for late or missed payment. If not addressed, state "Not addressed".

promptGenerator.fallbackPrompt: Review each document and extract the information relevant to "{title}". Provide a concise, document-specific summary for this column. Include the key facts, dates, thresholds, parties, and conditions where applicable. If the document does not contain relevant information, return "Not addressed".
